    void
    EntityGraph.fillAndWriteMappingTables(JobManager jobManager, OutputStreamWriter dmlResultWriter, int numberOfEntities, Session targetSession, DBMS targetDBMSConfiguration, DBMS dbmsConfiguration)

    void
    IntraDatabaseEntityGraph.fillAndWriteMappingTables(JobManager jobManager, OutputStreamWriter receiptWriter, int numberOfEntities, Session targetSession, DBMS targetDBMSConfiguration, DBMS dbmsConfiguration)

  • Verwendungen von JobManager in net.sf.jailer.importfilter

    Methoden in net.sf.jailer.importfilter mit Parametern vom Typ JobManager
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void
    ImportFilterManager.fillAndWriteMappingTables(EntityGraph entityGraph, JobManager jobManager, OutputStreamWriter dmlResultWriter, int numberOfEntities, Session targetSession, DBMS targetDBMSConfiguration)
    Inserts the values of columns with non-derived import-filters into the local database and writes the mapping table DML to the given writer.
